majorProjects.title: Portfolio Experience Platform
majorProjects.description: A personal portfolio system with animated storytelling, bold section transitions, and reusable UI components for showcasing work and achievements.

majorProjects.title: Trippn (AI powered travel planner)
majorProjects.description: An AI-powered travel planning web app that generates personalized itineraries based on user preferences, leveraging Google Gemini 2.5 flash for dynamic and engaging travel recommendations.

majorProjects.title: Myntra CLone (Frontend)
majorProjects.description: A frontend clone of the Myntra e-commerce platform, featuring a responsive design and interactive UI components to replicate the shopping experience. Built with React and styled-components for a modern and dynamic user interface.

minorProjects.title: BMI Calculator Web App
minorProjects.description: A simple web app for calculating Body Mass Index with a clean, user-friendly interface. learnt usage of UseEffect and useState hooks in React to manage state and side effects effectively.

minorProjects.title: Movie Searching App
minorProjects.description: A web app for searching and browsing movies with detailed information and user reviews. Implemented API integration to fetch movie data and used React hooks for state management and dynamic rendering.

minorProjects.title: Notes Vault
minorProjects.description: A simple note-keeping app with category filters and a focused reading and editing experience.
